Hardware Component File

APB_H45_P32M_V16

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference APB_H45_P32M_V16_20090212T092943.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 500000
Send ID 755
Receive ID 775
Functional Addr 0D
Functional Name APB

Reply Bytes N/A
